title: IntegrationProvider
description: Allowlist catalog of every provider Stackra supports (stripe / paddle / pipedrive / hubspot / twilio / zoom / apple_wallet / google_wallet / mailchimp / xero / etc). System rows only — added via #[AsIntegrationProvider] discovery + upsert seeder. Adding a provider is a code deploy. Tenants configure a provider by creating a TenantIntegration that points at an IntegrationProvider row.

slug.description: Globally unique — matches the #[AsIntegrationProvider(slug: '…')] attribute value. Convention: snake_case. `stripe`, `pipedrive`, `apple_wallet`.

kind.description: payment / crm / email / sms / calendar / chat / wallet / accounting / webhook / sso / video / storage.

auth_kind.description: oauth2 / api_key / basic / webhook_only. Drives the credential-input flow in the tenant admin UI.

scopes.description: For OAuth2 providers: array of scope strings the provider offers. Tenants pick a subset when configuring.

webhook_events.description: Array of event names the provider emits (subscribed to via TenantIntegration.subscribed_events).

config_schema.description: JSON schema for TenantIntegration.config. Validates config at configure time.

is_system.description: Always true. Included for symmetry with the dual-source-catalogue pattern; guardrail prevents non-system rows from being persisted.

enabled.description: Soft-disable a provider tenant-wide (e.g. Slack integration temporarily paused during a security review).

min_plan_tier.description: small / medium / enterprise. Provider requires the tenant to be on this tier or higher.

x-invariants: System rows only — writes outside IntegrationProvider::allowSystemMutation() throw SystemRowImmutableException per the dual-source-catalogue pattern.
slug matches the #[AsIntegrationProvider(slug: …)] attribute value on the discovered provider class.
Removing a row requires zero live TenantIntegration references (validated at delete time).
